title: Likert Scale in WorkForms
excerpt:
Would it be possible to add an option for a Likert Scale in WorkForms? 
We use this very often in our form development and I see that monday.com does not support this.

posts.author: MESURE (Jo-Anne Burgoyne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to add an option for a Likert Scale in WorkForms?
We use this very often in our form development and I see that monday.com does not support this.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app Easyform enables you to select how you display Status and Dropdown questions, as Raido buttons, Buttons, or as a dropdown:

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in your web page, you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps.

Nachliel
